review_title: Helps keep our team on the same page
description: My team of 3 designers loves using versions for Sketch. I think it works well for small teams but I cannot speak of how it would work for larger teams.
author: Monika J.
pros: With a basic understanding of git, Versions is a great tool for teams to collaborate. We love that you can see changes very easily with releas notes and background syncing.
cons: Sometimes the product is buggy. Syncing will be out of date or versions will tell us that there is a conflict when there really isn’t. That gets slightly annoying. It’s usually relatively easy to resolve, but it nevertheless is an annoyance we have to deal with.

review_title: I found it an extremely quick application for our firm
description: Its increase our productivity and also proved its efficiency
author: Atour T.
pros: It is a simple tool for presenting concepts to technical and cross-platform teams, and the comment option is really appreciated.Its helps us to complete our research project with its features.
cons: It's interface is sometimes seems complex. I think its Mobile version should be more user friendly.

author: Giles P.
pros: Easy to receive assets from designers in remote locations. Easy to see design history. Easy to diff history.
cons: We want to use the same project for iOS and Android but Sympli forces us to choose one platform. Because our projects are set to iOS and I develop on Android I am not able to use the Android Studio plugin

description: Been using it for several years, it is our main software for sharing UI/UX screens with our dev and biz partners.
author: Collin D.
pros: It's simplicity and straightforwardness.
cons: Trying to organize your artboards. The sorting and tagging are limiting when you have large workflows that may branch many times. If the designer isn't using a robust naming convention for their artboards then dev/biz often have a hard time finding a specific screen they're looking for.

review_title: Great little tool to get your designs to engineers
description: It's simple way of sharing the designs with your engineering team. It syncs well most of the time and the screens can be categorised and tagged in whichever way you prefer.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's easy to use and it works really well with iOS designs. I like that engineers have their own login and can browse through the project to find what they need.
cons: It's a little tricky exporting Android designs as they need to be 'processed' before syncing. Also, engineers keep finding it very difficult to find css details of the design elements.

review_title: Sympli has been a game changer in my work process in design. It made things easier and faster.
author: Dzoan H.
pros: It's very easy and practical to use. With just one command, I can share all my design assets from the source files to the development team(s) in one single place. I can also receive valuable feedback on my designs.
cons: It's actually very difficult to go back to the "old way" of doing the job: Extracting manually the files/assets one by one, zipping, emailing and again and again... Just thinking about it feels like a chore.

description: It makes front-end developing much faster and easier
author: Vlad K.
pros: 1. Really fast application 2. Easy navigation between different projects 3. Ability to save icons in vector/bitmap
cons: 1. Navigation by browser history buttons (back-forward). Occasionally when i click back button, I don't get the screen where i actually was. Also I'd like to save scroll position, when I'm on the list of designs, then click on one of them, and then go back to list. 2. Tag-filters. When I click "tag1" and "tag2" I expect to see designs which have "tag1" PLUS designs which have "tag2". It would be better if we have an ability to do like this.

author: Ashish P.
pros: Best collaboration platform for developers and designers Support for xcode android studio and photoshop though I have used for android studio only. Much needed plugins for developer once designing part has been completed With the help of this we are doing design and implement UI side by side while developing simultaneously. Drag and drop feature which shows real UI. Auto sync Aplying styling is very very easy.
cons: Earlier we had lot of issue not by technically but understanding the use of tool and how we can scale the plugins Sometimes while installing plaugin it crashes and no horizontal scroll Apart from that this doesnt have any cons and best in industry Must try!!

author: Rejah R.
pros: Having used many tools for design collaboration, Sympli comes across as one of the best tools to get the job done.
cons: Every design spec is readily available for the developer.

author: Roman V.
pros: Plugins integration into popular mobile IDE's, really easy to use, all needed platforms supported, all is cool )
cons: Auto-layout generation is useless, really that can't be used in real projects. Possible will be good to have more pricing models to allow a bit flexible plan.

review_title: Fantastic functionalities. Great team collaboration capabilities
author: Dmitriy P.
pros: Share and annotation capabilities. Ease of use and learning. Small learning curve. Easy communication.
cons: share and password difficulties. Takes time to reset password. Real time editing capabilities are limited.

author: Jess L.
pros: Saves a lot of time with dev handoffs and specs. I've gotten quite a few companies to start using it now with all my freelance and contract work.
cons: The new pricing structure. It ends up being quite a bit more than Zeplin with this structure for our company and makes it more difficult and time consuming to add and remove users. I've used it for so long and gotten so many companies to start using it, I was grandfathered in for a good deal on pricing, but with the new structure, they no longer give me my pricing. Because of this, I have begin to transition us away from Sympli, but it will take some time.

review_title: sympli is best app for collaboration and workflow platform for building
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: this tolls is very simple especially for ios it so simple just install plugin in xcode and then connect with the project then you can iplement design jus drag and drop to the story board
cons: import end export image is very simple, and feature for generate color is very cool, and priview of design in mobile app is very useable

author: Daniel P.
pros: I like that it is very simple to use. It alerts you when there are changes in any project you have access to and downloading assets is very easy and simple.
cons: What I like the least is that sometimes, in a complex interface, it is difficult to select the specific element you need.

review_title: Awesome App. Excess to the assets with ease. Grids and guidelines.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Access Guidelines, Grids, You can easily download all assets which are used in the mockups Comment Section Layers
cons: Responsiveness, No ability to close sidebars, Sometimes assets are not imported or imported partially, from Sketch App.

author: Harish R.
pros: Easy to use for collaboration with developers
cons: Its really tough to organize screens/projects only with tags

review_title: I use this software daily and have never had any issues.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Overall easy to use, and accomplishes what we need for our projects. I like that there are different options for downloading assets.
cons: Sometimes the manual measuring is difficult. If our UX designer doesn't set up the individual objects to click on, trying to use the ruler is a pain.

author: Jokim M.
pros: Its ease to collaborate designs, update them, and share them with different groups
cons: The price - we are using only the handoff feature

description: it had made the design handoff very easy and increased the efficiency and productivity of the team. Its been helpful, to answer any dev question in context of the designs. Its has helped us even more since our dev team is off-shore and across different time zones. Love the product, its simplicity and seamlessness with design softwares.
author: Apurva G.
pros: easy to use, plugins are seamless, support is pretty quick, easy to share with team, annotations makes its easy to communicate changes on the versions or answer and dev questions
cons: 1. tags: organizing projects is not intuitive, sometimes tags don't work as well; selection of tags, it selects multiple tags upon clicking them, so I have to go and deselect every time. 2. Sometime, svgs are not formatted correctly upon download.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Awesome Android studio and xcode plugins which ease out designer-developer development efforts - Neat pricing model
cons: One of the thing that frustrates me in sympli is, measurements really gets messed up if there are multiple components overlapping (especially for android designs)

author: Mariusz O.
pros: Speed, layers and fonts panel, font attachments
cons: Adding source file (e.g. sketch file, figma file) will be nice feature as a backup for future.

review_title: Bridge the gap between Designer and Developer
description: As a developer I get all the specifications needed easily and quickly without contacting the designer. I get notifications as and when the design is updated.
author: Ranjeet G.
pros: Simple UI, Specs info is great, Grid layout
cons: No option to remove notation indicators from the design it ruins taking screenshots

description: Overall a great tool, notification functionality is top notch.
author: Muhammad Adil M.
pros: Very easy to share all designs and logic with developers plus due to its online availability I can access it from anywhere. Easy to install and plugin and for story board it's only drag and drop.
cons: Some times slowness is frustrating and to setup manual measurement it is difficult for UI designer which needs to be fixed.

review_title: In general good experience, just sometimes found get a little tricky to get the information I need.
description: I'm always looking at the last mockup version. I don't need the Sketch licence.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I don't need the full licence of Sketch. Informations are distributed all over the team in one place, and none need to worry to check if it' updated.
cons: In this last revisions on some objects it was saying Black for a Gray text: I had to ask for the right color. When I need to try different times to select what I'm looking for, but this is not that big problem.

review_title: Easy upload with Sketch. Great for developers.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The sketch plugin is super easy to use and takes the friction out of getting designs to the development team. Also love that it is web-based, and can be accessed from my mobile phone or laptop. The Sympli team is also super responsive to user feedback, and I've totally felt supported by them.
cons: I've never been a big fan of how screens are grouped together. Personally, I'd prefer to set up folders to arrange the designs. But Sympli uses tags. This has been confusing for both me and for my developers -- when trying to see the design for a specific page or experience...
